sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91582" key="pu/rgeios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πύργ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91582.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a tower</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκοπή</foreign> Ion Trag.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
